---
title: "Index"
---

This is a Quarto website.
This website contains all of my lab reports from my time in Math 240: Computational Statistics at Colgate University. 

On this website, you can find labs among the following statistical topics:

1. Basic tasks in R
2. Matricies and dataframes in R
3. Programming and data visualization in R
4. Data wrangling and cleaning in R
5. Probability 
6. Point Estimation
7. Point Estimation, resampling, and Bootstrapping
8. A detailed review on probability

To learn more about Quarto websites visit <https://quarto.org/docs/websites>.
